mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Board (category_id, title, writer, content, password, view_count, created_at) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{title}, #{writer}, #{content}, #{password}, #{viewCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id, title, writer, content, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM Board ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, category_id, title, writer, content, password, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM Board WHERE id = #{id}
